/work/avenue-code.title: Avenue Code - Arev Steffen - Lead Product Designer Portfolio
/work/avenue-code.description: Arev is a lead product designer based in Portugal, with experience in enterprise and startups. With overa ten years of experience, he's lead design teams in different industries and stages. He's also does freelance projects with websites and brands.
p: At Avenue Code I helped grow the design practice from a small group to a team of 100+ designers, leading teams and initiatives across multiple industries (Education, Health, Finance, Retail and AI).
Interviewed and assessed 150+ designers and led dozens of designers day‑to‑day, supporting their growth, giving technical feedback, and shaping the design culture.

Led cross‑functional design squads for both enterprise and startup clients, from global banks and cloud security leaders to early‑stage AI products, aligning design, product and engineering around clear outcomes.
Created internal design programs and initiatives for knowledge sharing, team integration (crits, workshops, demos), raising the bar of our design practice across Brazil, US and Europe.
Modernized the design stack – Introduced and championed tools like Webflow, Framer and AI‑based workflows into our toolbox, accelerating prototyping, experimentation and delivery.

•⁠ ⁠Co‑led design for the public website of one of the largest banks in Europe, after winning a request for proposal bid.•⁠ ⁠Led a design sprint for one of the largest cloud security companies, helping them validate new product ideas, features and methods with clear decision outputs. The project evolve to a product that our team continued to work on for a number of years.•⁠ ⁠Worked on an AI initiative for a global “Big Four” accounting firm, designing an internal tool that unlocked measurable efficiency and financial impact in core processes.
Participated in RFPs, pitches and discovery workshops, translating business problems into design approaches and helping Avenue Code close new design and product engagements.
I build expressive, performance-driven products, websites and brands by blending tasty design and leadership to help tech teams and brands stand out with intention.

/work/grocery-buddy.title: Grocery Buddy  - Arev Steffen - Lead Product Designer Portfolio
/work/grocery-buddy.description: Arev is a lead product designer based in Portugal, with experience in enterprise and startups. With overa ten years of experience, he's lead design teams in different industries and stages. He's also does freelance projects with websites and brands.
p: I worked with the product team to design and develop features with the goal of shipping the fastest grocery list builder app in the market.

One of the main challenges was to compete with the native iOS Notes app. We dove deep to discover what was missing, and eventually we were able to understand the problems surrounding this experience. We accomplished the goal and shipped the fastest list builder to date.
The results of my contribution allowed the app to be one of the top shopping list builders downloads in the app store.
Established market fit after reaching DAU/MAU kpis.
Most downloaded grocery list builder in the App Store.
